landing.heroDesc: A next-generation biometric voting system with multi-factor authentication, real-time results, and complete transparency. Every vote counts, every vote is secure.
landing.everyVoteDesc: Your voice matters. Our secure biometric voting system ensures that every single vote is counted accurately and transparently. Join thousands of voters who trust our platform.
landing.featuresDesc: Built with cutting-edge security and ease of use in mind
landing.feature1Desc: Fingerprint-based identity verification ensures only authorized voters can cast their ballots.
landing.feature1Short: Fingerprint-based identity verification for every voter.
landing.feature2Desc: Two-factor authentication with email OTP adds an extra layer of security to the voting process.
landing.feature2Short: Email OTP adds an extra layer of security.
landing.feature3Desc: Live photo capture as proof of identity before voting, ensuring complete accountability.
landing.feature4Desc: Live election dashboard with instant updates, charts, and detailed activity logs.
landing.feature4Short: Live dashboard with instant election updates.
landing.ctaTitle: Ready to Make Your Voice Heard?
landing.ctaDesc: Join the future of secure and transparent democratic elections.

login.enterCredentials: Enter your credentials to access the voting system

dashboard.portalDesc: Your voter portal for secure and transparent elections
dashboard.otpDesc: Verify your email with a one-time password
dashboard.photoDesc: Capture your photo as proof of identity
dashboard.selectAndSubmit: Select a candidate and submit your vote
dashboard.alreadyVotedMsg: You have already voted. Thank you!

fingerprint.title: Fingerprint Verification
fingerprint.subtitle: Enter your Fingerprint ID to verify your identity

photo.title: Capture Your Photo
photo.subtitle: Your photo is required as proof of identity before voting
photo.verified: Fingerprint verified — please capture your photo to proceed to voting
photo.captureDesc: Your photo will be taken as proof of voting.
photo.noBrowserSupport: Your browser does not support camera access. Please use a modern browser or upload a photo instead.
photo.noCameraFound: No camera device found on this computer. Please connect a webcam or upload a photo instead.
photo.permissionDenied: Camera permission was denied. Please allow camera access in your browser settings and click "Retry Camera".
photo.noDeviceFound: No camera device found. Please connect a webcam or use the "Upload Photo" option below.
photo.cameraInUse: Camera is in use by another application. Please close other apps using the camera (e.g., Zoom, Teams, Skype) and click "Retry Camera".
photo.overconstrained: Camera does not meet the required constraints. Please try a different camera or upload a photo.
photo.genericError: Camera error: {{error}}. Please upload a photo instead.
photo.notAvailable: Camera not available. Please upload a photo instead.

voting.selectCandidate: Select a candidate to vote for
voting.alreadyVotedMsg: You have already cast your vote. Thank you for participating!

success.title: Vote Cast Successfully!
success.thankYou: Thank you for participating in the election. Your vote has been recorded securely.

admin.name: Name
admin.confirmDeleteVoter: Are you sure you want to delete this voter?
admin.confirmDeleteCandidate: Are you sure you want to delete this candidate?
admin.configureElectionTime: Configure election start and end times

otp.title: OTP Verification
otp.subtitle: A 6-digit OTP has been sent to your registered email

verify.title: Verify Your Vote
verify.subtitle: Enter your verification ID or scan the QR code on your receipt
verify.error: Verification failed. Please check the ID and try again.
